case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MARTIN M FLEISCHMAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100011703) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
